name: line-standard
description: Metadata profile for a production line within an area. A line is a coordinated sequence of equipment assets working toward a common production output.

telemetryPoints.name: line-state
telemetryPoints.description: Current operational state of the line. Typical values: Running, Stopped, Faulted, Idle.

telemetryPoints.name: throughput-rate
telemetryPoints.description: Current output rate of the line in units per minute.

telemetryPoints.name: shift-count
telemetryPoints.description: Number of units produced since the start of the current shift.
